home.title: Toolbox
home.subtitle: Utilities for encoding and decoding, format conversion, text processing, cryptography, networking, and data generation.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The page or tool you requested does not exist, or its address may have changed.

base64.name: Base64 Converter
base64.description: Encode text or files to Base64 and decode Base64 back to text.
base64.keywords: base64 encode decode convert file data url
base64.dropzone: Drop a file here or choose one

json.name: JSON Formatter
json.description: Format, minify, validate, escape and highlight JSON data.
json.keywords: json format minify validate escape highlight

jwt.name: JWT Decoder
jwt.description: Decode JWT header, payload and inspect expiration metadata.
jwt.keywords: jwt token decode parse header payload signature exp
jwt.invalidFormat: JWT must contain header, payload and signature.

uuid.name: UUID Generator
uuid.description: Generate batches of cryptographically random UUID v4 values.
uuid.keywords: uuid guid generate random v4 batch

hash.name: Hash Generator
hash.description: Create MD5, SHA-1, SHA-256 and SHA-512 hashes for text or files.
hash.keywords: hash md5 sha1 sha256 sha512 file checksum
hash.dropzone: Drop a file here or choose one

magic-hashes.name: Magic Hash List
magic-hashes.description: Browse verified hash values that may trigger type-juggling vulnerabilities in loose comparisons.
magic-hashes.keywords: magic hash php type juggling 0e md5 sha1 sha224 sha256 loose comparison security
magic-hashes.warning: Their hexadecimal digests match 0e followed only by digits. Some runtimes can interpret this as scientific notation for zero during a loose comparison. These are not cryptographic collisions.
magic-hashes.hint: For authentication, use strict comparison and a timing-safe function such as PHP hash_equals(); never compare digests with ==.

url.name: URL Encoder
url.description: Encode and decode URLs, then inspect query parameters in a table.
url.keywords: url encode decode query parameters parse

color.name: Color Converter
color.description: Convert HEX, RGB and HSL with preview and Tailwind-ready values.
color.keywords: color hex rgb hsl convert tailwind preview

regex.name: Regex Tester
regex.description: Test regular expressions live with match highlighting and presets.
regex.keywords: regex regular expression test match replace preset

password.name: Password Generator
password.description: Generate passwords with character controls and entropy estimates.
password.keywords: password generate secure entropy length characters

timestamp.name: Timestamp Converter
timestamp.description: Convert Unix timestamps, ISO strings and local date-time values.
timestamp.keywords: timestamp unix iso date time convert epoch

qrcode.name: QR Code Generator
qrcode.description: Generate downloadable QR codes from text or URLs.
qrcode.keywords: qr qrcode generate download png url

html-entity.name: HTML Entity Encoder
html-entity.description: Encode and decode HTML special characters safely.
html-entity.keywords: html entity encode decode escape unescape special characters

number-base.name: Number Base Converter
number-base.description: Convert numbers between binary, octal, decimal, hex and any base up to 36.
number-base.keywords: number base binary octal decimal hexadecimal radix convert

roman-numeral.name: Roman Numeral Converter
roman-numeral.description: Convert between Arabic numbers and Roman numerals (1 – 3999).

text-stats.name: Text Statistics
text-stats.description: Count characters, words, lines, sentences and byte size of text.
text-stats.keywords: text statistics count characters words lines bytes

case-converter.name: Case Converter
case-converter.description: Convert text between camelCase, PascalCase, snake_case, kebab-case and more.
case-converter.keywords: case convert camel pascal snake kebab constant title sentence
case-converter.title: Title Case

lorem-ipsum.name: Lorem Ipsum Generator
lorem-ipsum.description: Generate placeholder Lorem Ipsum paragraphs for layouts and mockups.
lorem-ipsum.keywords: lorem ipsum placeholder text generate paragraphs

slugify.name: Slug Generator
slugify.description: Turn any text into a clean URL-safe slug.
slugify.keywords: slug slugify url seo kebab dash

list-tools.name: List Cleaner
list-tools.description: Trim, deduplicate, sort and reverse list items line by line.
list-tools.keywords: list sort dedupe unique trim reverse lines

mac-address.name: MAC Address Generator
mac-address.description: Generate random MAC addresses with custom prefix, case and separator.
mac-address.keywords: mac address generate random network oui

ipv4-subnet.name: IPv4 Subnet Calculator
ipv4-subnet.description: Calculate network, broadcast, netmask and host range from CIDR notation.
ipv4-subnet.keywords: ipv4 subnet cidr netmask network broadcast calculator

random-port.name: Random Port Generator
random-port.description: Generate random ports outside the privileged well-known range.
random-port.hint: Ports are picked from 1024-65535, avoiding the privileged range.

http-status.name: HTTP Status Codes
http-status.description: Browse and search HTTP response status codes and their meanings.

http-headers.name: HTTP Request Headers
http-headers.description: Search common HTTP request headers and view their purpose, syntax, and examples.
http-headers.keywords: http request header reference lookup accept authorization user-agent syntax examples
http-headers.hint: Select a header to view syntax and examples.

mime-types.name: MIME Types
mime-types.description: Look up MIME types by file extension and vice versa.

basic-auth.name: Basic Auth Generator
basic-auth.description: Build an HTTP Basic Authorization header from username and password.
basic-auth.keywords: basic auth authorization header base64 generate

chmod-calculator.name: Chmod Calculator
chmod-calculator.description: Compose Unix file permissions and get octal, symbolic and command forms.
chmod-calculator.keywords: chmod permissions unix octal symbolic calculator

crontab-parser.name: Crontab Parser
crontab-parser.description: Parse cron expressions, inspect each field and preview upcoming runs.
crontab-parser.keywords: cron crontab schedule parser expression next run
crontab-parser.hint: Five fields: minute hour day-of-month month day-of-week. Supports lists, ranges, steps, names and @daily-style macros.
crontab-parser.noUpcoming: No upcoming runs within two years

totp.name: TOTP Generator
totp.description: Generate time-based one-time passwords (RFC 6238) from a Base32 secret.
totp.keywords: totp otp 2fa authenticator one-time password token

hmac.name: HMAC Generator
hmac.description: Compute HMAC signatures with SHA-1/256/384/512 as hex or Base64.
hmac.keywords: hmac signature sha hash secret key
hmac.emptySecret: Enter a secret key to compute the HMAC

rsa-key.name: RSA Key Generator
rsa-key.description: Generate RSA key pairs in the browser and export as PEM.
rsa-key.keywords: rsa key pair generate pem public private
rsa-key.hint: Keys are generated locally via Web Crypto and never leave your device.

xml-format.name: XML Formatter
xml-format.description: Pretty-print or minify XML with syntax validation.

json-csv.name: JSON ↔ CSV Converter
json-csv.description: Convert between a JSON array of objects and CSV, in both directions.
json-csv.keywords: json csv convert table export import
json-csv.jsonInvalid: Input must be a JSON array of objects
json-csv.hint: First CSV row is treated as the header. Numbers, true/false and null are auto-detected.

url-parser.name: URL Parser
url-parser.description: Split a URL into protocol, host, path, hash and query parameters.
url-parser.keywords: url parse protocol host port path query hash

ulid.name: ULID Generator
ulid.description: Generate sortable ULIDs (timestamp + randomness, Crockford Base32).
ulid.keywords: ulid unique id sortable generate identifier
ulid.hint: 26 characters: 10 encode the millisecond timestamp, 16 are random.

temperature.name: Temperature Converter
temperature.description: Convert between Celsius, Fahrenheit, Kelvin and Rankine.
temperature.keywords: temperature celsius fahrenheit kelvin rankine convert

nato-alphabet.name: NATO Alphabet
nato-alphabet.description: Spell text using the NATO phonetic alphabet.
nato-alphabet.keywords: nato phonetic alphabet alfa bravo charlie spell

text-binary.name: Text ↔ Binary
text-binary.description: Convert text to UTF-8 binary bytes and back.
text-binary.keywords: text binary bits bytes convert utf-8

keycode.name: Keycode Info
keycode.description: Press any key to inspect its key, code, keyCode and modifiers.
keycode.keywords: keycode keyboard event key code javascript

device-info.name: Device Information
device-info.description: Inspect screen, browser and system details of the current device.
device-info.keywords: device screen resolution browser user agent info

text-diff.name: Text Diff
text-diff.description: Compare two texts line by line and highlight additions and deletions.
text-diff.keywords: diff compare text difference lines merge
text-diff.tooLarge: Input too large to diff (max 2000 lines each)

math-evaluator.name: Math Evaluator
math-evaluator.description: Safely evaluate math expressions with functions and constants.
math-evaluator.keywords: math evaluate expression calculator function sqrt sin
math-evaluator.hint: Supports + - * / % ^, parentheses, pi, e and functions like sqrt, sin, log, abs, round.

percentage-calculator.name: Percentage Calculator
percentage-calculator.description: Work out percentages, ratios and percentage change.
percentage-calculator.keywords: percentage percent ratio change increase calculator
percentage-calculator.whatPercent: X is what percent of Y?

string-obfuscator.name: String Obfuscator
string-obfuscator.description: Mask sensitive strings like tokens and keys, keeping a few visible chars.
string-obfuscator.keywords: obfuscate mask redact secret token hide string
string-obfuscator.hint: Everything except the first and last kept characters is replaced with *.

text-unicode.name: Text ↔ Unicode
text-unicode.description: Convert text to \u escape sequences and back.
text-unicode.keywords: unicode escape code point text convert utf-16
text-unicode.hint: Encodes to \uXXXX. Decoding also accepts \u{XXXXX} code-point form.

wifi-qrcode.name: WiFi QR Code
wifi-qrcode.description: Generate a QR code that connects devices to a WiFi network.
wifi-qrcode.keywords: wifi qr code network password connect ssid

svg-placeholder.name: SVG Placeholder
svg-placeholder.description: Generate lightweight SVG placeholder images with custom size and colors.
svg-placeholder.keywords: svg placeholder image mockup dummy generate

regex-cheatsheet.name: Regex Cheatsheet
regex-cheatsheet.description: A quick reference for regular expression syntax.
regex-cheatsheet.keywords: regex regular expression cheatsheet reference syntax
regex-cheatsheet.set: Any of a, b or c
regex-cheatsheet.negSet: None of a, b or c
regex-cheatsheet.question: 0 or 1 (optional)

ipv4-converter.name: IPv4 Address Converter
ipv4-converter.description: Convert an IPv4 address between dotted, decimal, hex, binary and IPv6 forms.
ipv4-converter.keywords: ipv4 address convert decimal hex binary integer ipv6

ipv4-range.name: IPv4 Range Expander
ipv4-range.description: Turn a start–end IPv4 range into the minimal set of CIDR blocks.
ipv4-range.keywords: ipv4 range cidr expand blocks subnet aggregate

iban-validator.name: IBAN Validator
iban-validator.description: Validate an IBAN with the ISO 7064 mod-97 checksum and split its parts.
iban-validator.keywords: iban bank account validate mod97 checksum

user-agent.name: User-Agent Parser
user-agent.description: Parse a User-Agent string into browser, engine, OS and device.
user-agent.keywords: user agent parse browser os device engine

email-normalizer.name: Email Normalizer
email-normalizer.description: Normalize email addresses and strip +tags and Gmail dots.
email-normalizer.keywords: email normalize gmail dots plus tag lowercase
email-normalizer.hint: Lowercases the address, removes +tags, and strips dots for Gmail addresses.

numeronym.name: Numeronym Generator
numeronym.description: Create numeronyms like i18n from words (first + count + last).
numeronym.keywords: numeronym i18n a11y abbreviation shorten word
numeronym.hint: Each word becomes first letter + number of omitted letters + last letter.

meta-tags.name: Meta Tag Generator
meta-tags.keywords: meta tags open graph og twitter seo html head
meta-tags.title: Title

json-diff.name: JSON Diff
json-diff.description: Compare two JSON documents and list added, removed and changed paths.
json-diff.keywords: json diff compare difference object patch
json-diff.invalid: One side is not valid JSON

yaml-json.name: YAML ↔ JSON
yaml-json.description: Convert between YAML and JSON in both directions.

toml-json.name: TOML ↔ JSON
toml-json.description: Convert between TOML and JSON in both directions.
toml-json.keywords: toml json convert parse serialize config
toml-json.jsonInvalid: Invalid JSON (root must be an object)
toml-json.hint: The JSON root must be an object to serialize back to TOML.

sql-format.name: SQL Formatter
sql-format.description: Pretty-print SQL for many dialects with keyword casing.
sql-format.keywords: sql format beautify pretty mysql postgresql query

markdown-preview.name: Markdown Preview
markdown-preview.description: Render Markdown to sanitized HTML with a live preview.
markdown-preview.keywords: markdown preview html render gfm md
markdown-preview.hint: GitHub-flavored Markdown, sanitized with DOMPurify. Copy button yields the HTML.

bcrypt.name: Bcrypt Hash
bcrypt.description: Hash passwords with bcrypt and verify a password against a hash.
bcrypt.keywords: bcrypt hash password salt compare verify
bcrypt.hint: Everything runs locally; higher rounds are slower but more secure.

emoji-picker.name: Emoji Picker
emoji-picker.description: Browse nearly 1,600 emojis, search them in English or Chinese, and click to copy.
emoji-picker.keywords: emoji picker search copy unicode smiley English Chinese bilingual
emoji-picker.searchPlaceholder: Search emojis in English or Chinese...
emoji-picker.hint: Search by English or Chinese names and keywords, then click any emoji to copy it.

json-minify.name: JSON Minify / Prettify
json-minify.description: Convert between pretty and minified JSON in real-time, with bidirectional editing and size stats.
json-minify.keywords: json minify prettify format compress beautify

xml-json.name: XML ↔ JSON Converter
xml-json.description: Bidirectional conversion between XML and JSON, with attribute support and auto type inference.
xml-json.keywords: xml json convert parse attribute serialize
xml-json.hint: Edit on either side, the other side will convert automatically

date-converter.name: Date-Time Converter
date-converter.description: Convert dates between ISO 8601, UTC, Unix timestamps and human-readable formats.
date-converter.keywords: date time timestamp iso 8601 utc unix convert format
date-converter.placeholder: ISO string, Unix timestamp, or any parseable date
date-converter.hint: Accepts ISO 8601, RFC 2822, Unix seconds/milliseconds, and locale date strings.

ipv6-ula.name: IPv6 ULA Generator
ipv6-ula.description: Generate a unique local IPv6 address (ULA) prefix following RFC 4193.
ipv6-ula.keywords: ipv6 ula unique local address rfc 4193 prefix network
ipv6-ula.seedPlaceholder: MAC address or any string; leave blank for random
ipv6-ula.hint: The Global ID is derived from a SHA-1 hash of the seed, per RFC 4193 §3.2.2.

phone-parser.name: Phone Number Parser
phone-parser.description: Parse, validate and format international phone numbers.
phone-parser.keywords: phone number parse validate format e164 international national country
phone-parser.empty: Enter a phone number to parse it.

ascii-art.name: ASCII Art Text
ascii-art.description: Turn text into ASCII art banners using figlet fonts.
ascii-art.keywords: ascii art text figlet banner font generator

yaml-toml.name: YAML ↔ TOML
yaml-toml.description: Convert between YAML and TOML in both directions.
yaml-toml.keywords: yaml toml convert parse serialize config
yaml-toml.yamlInvalid: Invalid YAML (the root must be a mapping for TOML)
yaml-toml.hint: Edit on either side, the other side will convert automatically. TOML requires the top level to be a table.

token-generator.name: Token Generator
token-generator.description: Generate random strings with configurable character sets, length and count.
token-generator.keywords: token random string generate uppercase lowercase numbers symbols
token-generator.empty: Select at least one character set.

encryption.name: Encrypt / Decrypt Text
encryption.description: Encrypt and decrypt text with AES-256-GCM using a passphrase, fully in the browser.
encryption.keywords: encrypt decrypt aes gcm cipher passphrase secret text
encryption.decryptError: Decryption failed — wrong passphrase or corrupted data
encryption.hint: AES-256-GCM with a PBKDF2-SHA256 key (100,000 iterations). Output is Base64(salt ∥ IV ∥ ciphertext). Everything stays in your browser.

password-strength.name: Password Strength
password-strength.description: Estimate the brute-force strength and crack time of a password.
password-strength.keywords: password strength entropy crack time brute force analyzer
password-strength.hint: Brute-force estimate only: it assumes random characters and ignores dictionary words and reuse. The password never leaves your browser.

eta-calculator.name: ETA Calculator
eta-calculator.description: Estimate the finish time of a task from progress and elapsed time.
eta-calculator.keywords: eta estimate remaining time progress duration finish
eta-calculator.invalid: Enter a positive total, done ≤ total, and a positive elapsed time.

chronometer.name: Chronometer
chronometer.description: A stopwatch with lap times, accurate to hundredths of a second.
chronometer.keywords: chronometer stopwatch timer lap elapsed time measure

base64-file.name: Base64 File Converter
base64-file.description: Encode files to Base64 / data URLs and decode Base64 back into downloadable files.
base64-file.keywords: base64 file encode decode data url download upload blob
base64-file.dropLabel: Drop a file here or click to choose
base64-file.decodePlaceholder: Paste raw Base64 or a data URL
base64-file.hint: Files are processed entirely in your browser and never uploaded.

safelink-decoder.name: SafeLink Decoder
safelink-decoder.description: Extract the original URL from Outlook SafeLinks and other redirect wrappers.
safelink-decoder.keywords: safelink outlook decode redirect url unwrap tracking
safelink-decoder.invalid: Could not find a target URL in this link
safelink-decoder.hint: Supports Outlook SafeLinks and generic redirectors that carry the target in a url/q/u/target parameter.

docker-compose.name: Docker Compose Builder
docker-compose.description: Build a docker-compose.yml visually by adding services, ports, environment variables and volumes.
docker-compose.keywords: docker compose yaml container service port volume environment devops
docker-compose.empty: Add a service to get started.
docker-compose.hint: Everything is generated locally. Empty fields are omitted from the output.

git-memo.name: Git Cheatsheet
git-memo.description: A searchable memo of the most common Git commands.
git-memo.keywords: git cheatsheet memo commands version control reference
git-memo.init: Create a new repository in the current directory
git-memo.clone: Clone a repository into a new directory
git-memo.configName: Set the name attached to your commits
git-memo.configEmail: Set the email attached to your commits
git-memo.add: Stage a file for the next commit
git-memo.commit: Record staged changes with a message
git-memo.switchCreate: Create a new branch and switch to it
git-memo.merge: Merge a branch into the current one
git-memo.rebase: Reapply commits on top of another branch
git-memo.rebaseInteractive: Interactively rebase the last n commits
git-memo.fetch: Download objects and refs without merging
git-memo.pull: Fetch and integrate changes from the remote
git-memo.push: Upload local commits to the remote
git-memo.pushUpstream: Push and set the upstream branch
git-memo.pushForce: Force push safely, aborting if the remote moved
git-memo.restore: Discard changes in the working tree for a file
git-memo.unstage: Unstage a file, keeping its changes
git-memo.resetHard: Reset the working tree and index to HEAD
git-memo.resetSoft: Undo the last commit, keeping changes staged
git-memo.revert: Create a new commit that undoes a commit
git-memo.logGraph: Show commit history as a graph
git-memo.show: Show the details of a commit
git-memo.blame: Show who last changed each line of a file
git-memo.stashPop: Reapply the most recently stashed changes
git-memo.reflog: Show the history of HEAD movements
git-memo.cherryPick: Apply the changes from a specific commit

yaml-viewer.name: YAML Viewer
yaml-viewer.description: Parse YAML and explore it as an interactive collapsible tree.
yaml-viewer.keywords: yaml viewer tree explore parse inspect nested
yaml-viewer.hint: Click a node to collapse or expand it. Parsing happens entirely in your browser.

benchmark-builder.name: Benchmark Builder
benchmark-builder.description: Paste timing samples for several implementations and compare mean, median and spread.
benchmark-builder.keywords: benchmark builder compare timing statistics mean median performance
benchmark-builder.title: Name
benchmark-builder.valuesPlaceholder: Paste numbers separated by spaces, commas or new lines
benchmark-builder.hint: The fastest implementation (lowest mean) is highlighted and used as the 1.00× baseline.

camera-recorder.name: Camera Recorder
camera-recorder.description: Take snapshots and record video from your webcam, entirely in the browser.
camera-recorder.keywords: camera webcam recorder video snapshot photo capture media
camera-recorder.error: Could not access the camera. Grant permission and try again.
camera-recorder.unsupported: Your browser does not support camera capture.
camera-recorder.hintCapture: Take a photo or record a clip — results appear here.
camera-recorder.hint: Nothing is uploaded: capture stays on your device. Recordings are saved as WebM.

html-wysiwyg.name: HTML WYSIWYG Editor
html-wysiwyg.description: Edit rich text and get clean, sanitized HTML source in real time.
html-wysiwyg.keywords: html wysiwyg editor rich text contenteditable format
html-wysiwyg.heading: Heading
html-wysiwyg.hint: The source is sanitized with DOMPurify. Edit either side and the other updates.

pdf-signature-checker.name: PDF Signature Checker
pdf-signature-checker.description: Inspect a PDF for digital signatures and read their metadata, locally.
pdf-signature-checker.keywords: pdf signature checker digital sign verify metadata document
pdf-signature-checker.dropLabel: Drop a PDF here or click to choose
pdf-signature-checker.invalid: This file is not a valid PDF
pdf-signature-checker.hint: This reads signature metadata only; it does not cryptographically verify the certificate chain.

mac-address-lookup.name: MAC Address Lookup
mac-address-lookup.description: Identify the vendor of a MAC address from its OUI prefix.
mac-address-lookup.keywords: mac address lookup oui vendor manufacturer network hardware
mac-address-lookup.empty: Enter at least the first 3 bytes of a MAC address.
mac-address-lookup.hint: Uses a built-in subset of the IEEE OUI registry, so uncommon vendors may show as unknown.

bip39-generator.name: BIP39 Mnemonic Generator
bip39-generator.description: Generate and validate BIP39 mnemonic seed phrases in 10 languages.
bip39-generator.keywords: bip39 mnemonic seed phrase wallet crypto entropy recovery
bip39-generator.entropyInvalid: Entropy must be 32, 40, 48, 56 or 64 hex characters
bip39-generator.hint: Generated in your browser with a CSPRNG. Never enter a real wallet's seed phrase into any website.

cyberchef.name: CyberChef
cyberchef.description: The full CyberChef engine with all 495 operations. Build a recipe, drag to reorder, and everything runs in your browser.
cyberchef.keywords: cyberchef recipe pipeline base64 hex hash rot13 jwt encode decode encrypt cipher magic chain
cyberchef.loadError: Failed to load the CyberChef engine.
cyberchef.emptyRecipe: Add operations from the library to build a recipe.
cyberchef.emptyFavorites: Star an operation to add it here.

png-size-fixer.name: PNG Size Fixer
png-size-fixer.description: Brute-force and repair the real width/height of a deformed PNG via its IHDR CRC — a lifesaver for CTF forensics. Runs entirely in your browser.
png-size-fixer.keywords: png width height crc ihdr repair fix deformed ctf misc forensics restore brute force
png-size-fixer.dropLabel: Drop a PNG here, or click to choose
png-size-fixer.notPng: Not a valid PNG file. Please try another.
png-size-fixer.crcValid: ✓ CRC already matches — no fix needed
png-size-fixer.deepScan: Deep scan (sweep width & height together, slower)
png-size-fixer.notFound: No match found. Increase the max dimension or enable deep scan.
png-size-fixer.manualHint: Set the width and height directly and export.
png-size-fixer.hint: Everything runs locally in your browser; the file is never uploaded.

hex.name: Hex Encode / Decode
hex.description: Convert text to and from its hexadecimal byte representation (UTF-8).
hex.keywords: hex hexadecimal encode decode bytes utf-8 text convert
hex.hint: Whitespace, colons, 0x and \x prefixes are ignored when decoding.

morse.name: Morse Code
morse.description: Translate text to and from International Morse code.
morse.keywords: morse code translate encode decode dots dashes signal
morse.hint: Letters separated by spaces, words by " / ".

core-values-cipher.name: Core Values Cipher
core-values-cipher.description: Encode and decode text using the 12 socialist core values — a popular Chinese CTF cipher.
core-values-cipher.keywords: core values socialist cipher encode decode ctf chinese 核心价值观
core-values-cipher.cipherPlaceholder: Paste the core-values text to decode

jsfuck.name: JSFuck Encoder
jsfuck.description: Encode JavaScript into JSFuck — runnable code written with only []()!+ characters.
jsfuck.keywords: jsfuck javascript obfuscate encode esoteric xss
jsfuck.hint: The output is valid JavaScript that runs the original code.

leet-speak.name: Leet Speak
leet-speak.description: Convert text into leet (1337) speak, with a simple or an extended random style.
leet-speak.keywords: leet 1337 speak convert hacker text l33t

cn-en-spacing.name: CJK / English Spacing
cn-en-spacing.description: Automatically insert spaces between Chinese and English/number characters.
cn-en-spacing.keywords: chinese english spacing pangu space cjk format 排版 空格
cn-en-spacing.inputPlaceholder: Enter mixed Chinese and English text
cn-en-spacing.hint: Adds a space at every CJK–Latin boundary.

line-numbers.name: Add Line Numbers
line-numbers.description: Prefix every line with a sequential number.
line-numbers.keywords: line numbers prefix number lines text list
line-numbers.inputPlaceholder: Enter text, one item per line

text-shuffle.name: Text Shuffle
text-shuffle.description: Randomly shuffle characters within each line, or shuffle whole lines.
text-shuffle.keywords: shuffle random text scramble lines characters order
text-shuffle.hint: Character counts are preserved; only order changes.

ascii-table.name: ASCII Table
ascii-table.description: Full ASCII reference table (0–127) with decimal, hex, octal and binary values.
ascii-table.keywords: ascii table chart code decimal hex octal binary character reference
ascii-table.searchPlaceholder: Search by char, decimal or hex…

des.name: DES Encrypt / Decrypt
des.description: Encrypt and decrypt with the DES algorithm (CBC/CFB/OFB/CTR/ECB, multiple paddings).
des.keywords: des encrypt decrypt cipher cbc ecb crypto
des.decryptError: Decryption failed — check key, IV and options
des.hint: All encryption happens locally in your browser.

triple-des.name: 3DES Encrypt / Decrypt
triple-des.description: Encrypt and decrypt with the Triple DES algorithm (CBC/CFB/OFB/CTR/ECB, multiple paddings).
triple-des.keywords: 3des triple des encrypt decrypt cipher cbc ecb crypto
triple-des.decryptError: Decryption failed — check key, IV and options
triple-des.hint: All encryption happens locally in your browser.

random-ip.name: Random IP Generator
random-ip.description: Generate batches of random IPv4 addresses.
random-ip.keywords: random ip ipv4 generator address test
random-ip.hint: Generated locally; nothing is sent to a server.

random-email.name: Random Email Generator
random-email.description: Generate random email addresses with a custom charset, length and domain.
random-email.keywords: random email generator address fake test

random-ua.name: Random User-Agent
random-ua.description: Generate random User-Agent strings for testing.
random-ua.keywords: random user agent ua generator browser test
random-ua.hint: Combinations are assembled locally for testing only.

cidr-aggregator.name: CIDR Aggregator
cidr-aggregator.description: Merge a list of IPv4 addresses and CIDR blocks into the minimal set of CIDRs.
cidr-aggregator.keywords: cidr aggregate merge ip ipv4 subnet summarize network
cidr-aggregator.inputPlaceholder: One IP or CIDR per line
cidr-aggregator.hint: IPv4 only. Adjacent and overlapping ranges are merged.

file-type.name: Name
file-type.description: Identify a file's real format from its magic-number signature.
file-type.keywords: file type magic number signature detect identify format header
file-type.dropLabel: Drop a file here, or click to choose
file-type.unknown: Unrecognized signature — see the raw magic bytes below.
file-type.hint: Only the first 32 bytes are read; the file is never uploaded.

json-to-go.name: JSON to Go
json-to-go.description: Convert a JSON object into a Go struct definition.
json-to-go.keywords: json go struct golang convert type generate

dir-tree.name: Directory Tree
dir-tree.description: Generate an ASCII directory tree from a local folder.
dir-tree.keywords: directory tree folder structure ascii generate file
dir-tree.hint: The folder is read locally in your browser; nothing is uploaded.

css-minify.name: CSS Minifier
css-minify.description: Minify CSS by stripping comments and unnecessary whitespace.
css-minify.keywords: css minify compress minifier whitespace optimize
